text: I'd like to check in for my flight.
description: 值机柜台的标准开场白。
examples_json: [{"en":"Hi, I'd like to check in for my flight to London.","zh":"你好，我要办理去伦敦的值机。"}]

text: Can I have a window seat please?
description: 选座位。window seat = 靠窗，aisle seat = 靠走道。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I have a window seat, please?","zh":"能给我靠窗座位吗？"}]

text: How many bags can I check in?
description: 询问托运行李件数和限额。

text: Is my luggage overweight?
description: 超重要付费。overweight = 超重，extra fee = 额外费用。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is my luggage overweight? I can take some things out.","zh":"我的行李超重了吗？我可以拿出一些东西。"}]

text: What gate does my flight depart from?
meaning: 我的航班在哪个登机口？
description: 确认登机口。登机口可能在起飞前变更。
examples_json: [{"en":"What gate does my flight depart from?","zh":"我的航班在哪个登机口？"}]

text: Do I need to take my laptop out?
meaning: 我需要把笔记本电脑拿出来吗？
description: 安检时电脑、平板等电子产品需单独放托盘。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do I need to take my laptop out of the bag?","zh":"我需要把笔记本电脑从包里拿出来吗？"}]

text: Can I bring this in my carry-on?
description: 确定物品是否符合随身行李规定。液体限100ml。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I bring this bottle in my carry-on?","zh":"这个瓶子能带随身行李吗？"}]

text: Please put your bag on the belt.
description: 安检人员指示把行李放进扫描机。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please put your bag on the belt and walk through.","zh":"请把包放上传送带，然后走过去。"}]

text: When does boarding start?
description: 确认登机时间。boarding time = 登机时间。
examples_json: [{"en":"When does boarding start for flight BA168?","zh":"BA168航班什么时候开始登机？"}]

text: Is the flight on time?
description: 确认航班是否延误。on time = 准时，delayed = 延误。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is the flight to Tokyo on time?","zh":"去东京的航班准时吗？"}]

text: Has the gate changed?
description: 登机口变更很常见，随时注意显示屏和广播。
examples_json: [{"en":"Has the gate changed? I heard an announcement.","zh":"登机口变了吗？我听到广播了。"}]

text: I'm here for tourism.
description: 说明来访目的最常见回答。tourism/business/study。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm here for tourism. I'm staying for a week.","zh":"我来旅游的，待一周。"}]

text: I'll be staying for a week.
description: 说明停留时间。入境官员关心的是你什么时候离境。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'll be staying for a week.","zh":"我待一周。"}]

text: I have a return ticket.
description: 入境官员可能要求出示回程机票。电子版也可以。
examples_json: [{"en":"Yes, I have a return ticket.","zh":"有的，我有回程机票。"}]

text: I'm staying at the Grand Hotel.
description: 说明住宿地址。酒店名或 Airbnb 地址都行。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm staying at the Grand Hotel in the city center.","zh":"我住在市中心的大酒店。"}]

text: Which carousel is my luggage on?
description: 下飞机后先看大屏幕找行李转盘号。
examples_json: [{"en":"Which carousel is my luggage on?","zh":"我的行李在哪个转盘？"}]

text: My luggage didn't arrive.
description: 行李丢失立即去航空公司柜台报失。
examples_json: [{"en":"My luggage didn't arrive. What should I do?","zh":"我的行李没到，该怎么办？"}]

text: I need to report a lost bag.
description: 在 baggage claim 附近的航空公司柜台办理。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to report a lost bag. Here's my baggage tag.","zh":"我需要报失行李，这是我的行李牌。"}]

text: I have nothing to declare.
meaning: 我没有需要申报的东西。
description: 走绿色通道(无申报)的标准回答。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have nothing to declare. Just personal items.","zh":"我没有需要申报的，都是个人物品。"}]

text: I have some gifts to declare.
meaning: 我有一些礼物需要申报。
description: 携带礼品超过免税额度时需要申报。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have some gifts to declare. They're worth about 200 dollars.","zh":"我有一些礼物要申报，大约价值200美元。"}]

text: These are for personal use.
description: 说明物品用途。for personal use = 自用，as gifts = 作为礼物。
examples_json: [{"en":"These items are for personal use.","zh":"这些物品是自用的。"}]

text: Can you take me to this address?
description: 告诉司机目的地。可以直接展示手机上的地址。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you take me to this address, please?","zh":"能带我去这个地址吗？"}]

text: How much will it cost?
description: 问车费。有些城市 flat rate(一口价)有的打表。
examples_json: [{"en":"How much will it cost to get to the airport?","zh":"去机场大概多少钱？"}]

text: Please turn on the meter.
description: 确保司机使用计价器。meter = 计价器。
examples_json: [{"en":"Could you please turn on the meter?","zh":"能打表吗？"}]

text: How long does it take to get there?
description: 问大概的行车时间。好规划接下来的安排。
examples_json: [{"en":"How long does it take to get to the hotel?","zh":"到酒店要多久？"}]

text: Please drop me off here.
description: 到了目的地让司机停车。drop off = 让...下车。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please drop me off here. Thank you!","zh":"请在这里停，谢谢！"}]

text: Is this your first time visiting?
description: 和司机聊天的开场白。司机通常很了解当地。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is this your first time visiting our city?","zh":"你是第一次来我们城市吗？"}]

text: Can you recommend a good restaurant?
meaning: 你能推荐一个好餐厅吗？
description: 问司机当地美食推荐。local food = 当地特色。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you recommend a good local restaurant?","zh":"你能推荐一个好的本地餐厅吗？"}]

text: I have a reservation under the name Maya.
description: 酒店入住确认预订的标准说法。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a reservation under the name Maya.","zh":"我用Maya的名字做了预订。"}]

text: Can I see your ID please?
description: 前台要求出示身份证件。需要用护照或身份证。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I see your passport or ID, please?","zh":"能看一下您的护照或身份证吗？"}]

text: What time is check-out?
description: 确认退房时间。通常酒店是 11 AM。
examples_json: [{"en":"What time is check-out?","zh":"退房时间是几点？"}]

text: Is breakfast included?
description: 确认房价是否含早餐。breakfast included = 含早。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is breakfast included in the price?","zh":"房价含早餐吗？"}]

text: Can I have a wake-up call at 6 AM?
description: 设置叫醒服务。出国赶早班机/行程很有用。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I have a wake-up call at 6 AM?","zh":"能早上6点叫醒我吗？"}]

text: The AC in my room isn't working.
description: 报修。AC = air conditioner(空调)。
examples_json: [{"en":"The AC in my room isn't working. Can you send someone?","zh":"我房间的空调坏了，能派人来看看吗？"}]

text: Can I have extra towels please?
description: 索要额外用品。extra pillows/towels/blankets。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I have extra towels, please?","zh":"能多拿几条毛巾吗？"}]

text: I'd like to check out now.
description: 退房时告诉前台。check out = 退房。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd like to check out now. Here's my room key.","zh":"我现在想退房，这是我的房卡。"}]

text: Can I get a receipt?
description: 退房后需要发票或收据报销。receipt = 收据。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I get a receipt for my stay?","zh":"能给我住宿的收据吗？"}]

text: Can I store my luggage here?
description: 退房后行李寄存。luggage storage = 行李寄存。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I store my luggage here until 3 PM?","zh":"我能把行李寄存到下午3点吗？"}]

text: Excuse me how do I get to the museum?
description: 问路标准开场。Excuse me 开头更礼貌。
examples_json: [{"en":"Excuse me, how do I get to the museum?","zh":"请问去博物馆怎么走？"}]

text: Is it far from here?
description: 确认距离。far = 远，walking distance = 步行距离。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is it far from here? Can I walk?","zh":"离这里远吗？可以走路吗？"}]

text: Go straight then turn left.
description: 常用方向表达。turn left = 左转，turn right = 右转。
examples_json: [{"en":"Go straight ahead, then turn left at the traffic light.","zh":"直走，在红绿灯那左转。"}]
